Action Required: Policy Sign-off

Dear {{name}},

As part of your onboarding process, we require you to review and acknowledge our company policy documents.

Required Action:

Please access your onboarding portal to review and digitally sign the company policy documents.

These policies outline important guidelines for your employment and workplace conduct.

Important: Completion of policy acknowledgment is required before you can proceed to the next phase of your onboarding.

If you have any questions about the policies or need assistance with the signing process, please contact our HR team.

Thank you for your cooperation.

HR Team
